"""Unit tests for capture_plan_header_block pipeline step."""

from pathlib import Path

from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
    SubmitState,
    capture_plan_header_block,
)
from erk.core.context import context_for_test
from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub
from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails

_METADATA_BLOCK = (
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:start -->\n"
    "schema_version: 2\n"
    "created_by: test\n"
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:end -->"
)

_SEPARATOR = "\n\n---\n\n"


def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    plan_header_block: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch="main",
        trunk_branch="main",
        use_graphite=False,
        force=False,
        debug=False,
        session_id="test-session",
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        issue_number=None,
        pr_number=None,
        pr_url=None,
        was_created=False,
        base_branch=None,
        graphite_url=None,
        diff_file=None,
        plan_context=None,
        title=None,
        body=None,
        plan_header_block=plan_header_block,
    )


def _pr_with_metadata(*, number: int = 42, branch: str = "feature") -> PRDetails:
    body = _METADATA_BLOCK + _SEPARATOR + "Plan content here"
    return PRDetails(
        number=number,
        url=f"https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/{number}",
        title="Test PR",
        body=body,
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name=branch,
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
        is_draft=True,
        is_cross_repository=False,
        owner="owner",
        repo="repo",
    )


def test_captures_metadata_from_existing_pr(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Plan header block is captured from PR body containing a metadata block."""
    pr = _pr_with_metadata(number=42, branch="feature")
    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert "<!-- erk:metadata-block:start -->" in result.plan_header_block
    assert result.plan_header_block.endswith(_SEPARATOR)


def test_no_pr_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When no PR exists for the branch, state is returned unchanged."""
    fake_github = FakeGitHub()
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.plan_header_block == ""


def test_pr_without_metadata_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When PR body has no metadata block, state is returned unchanged."""
    pr = PRDetails(
        number=42,
        url="https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
        title="Test PR",
        body="Just a plain PR body with no metadata",
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name="feature",
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
        is_draft=False,
        is_cross_repository=False,
        owner="owner",
        repo="repo",
    )
    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.plan_header_block == ""

"""Unit tests for capture_existing_pr_body pipeline step."""

from pathlib import Path

from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
    SubmitState,
    capture_existing_pr_body,
)
from erk.core.context import context_for_test
from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub
from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails

_PR_BODY_WITH_METADATA = (
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:start -->\n"
    "schema_version: 2\n"
    "created_by: test\n"
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:end -->\n\n---\n\n"
    "Plan content here"
)


def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    existing_pr_body: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch="main",
        trunk_branch="main",
        use_graphite=False,
        force=False,
        debug=False,
        session_id="test-session",
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        issue_number=None,
        pr_number=None,
        pr_url=None,
        was_created=False,
        base_branch=None,
        graphite_url=None,
        diff_file=None,
        plan_context=None,
        title=None,
        body=None,
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
    )


def _pr_with_metadata(*, number: int = 42, branch: str = "feature") -> PRDetails:
    return PRDetails(
        number=number,
        url=f"https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/{number}",
        title="Test PR",
        body=_PR_BODY_WITH_METADATA,
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name=branch,
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
        is_draft=True,
        is_cross_repository=False,
        owner="owner",
        repo="repo",
    )


def test_captures_full_body_from_existing_pr(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Full PR body is captured from existing PR."""
    pr = _pr_with_metadata(number=42, branch="feature")
    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_existing_pr_body(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.existing_pr_body == pr.body


def test_no_pr_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When no PR exists for the branch, state is returned unchanged."""
    fake_github = FakeGitHub()
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_existing_pr_body(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.existing_pr_body == ""


def test_pr_with_empty_body_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When PR body is empty, state is returned unchanged."""
    pr = PRDetails(
        number=42,
        url="https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
        title="Test PR",
        body="",
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name="feature",
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
        is_draft=False,
        is_cross_repository=False,
        owner="owner",
        repo="repo",
    )
    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_existing_pr_body(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.existing_pr_body == ""

"""Unit tests for capture_plan_header_block pipeline step."""

from pathlib import Path

from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
    SubmitState,
    capture_plan_header_block,
)
from erk.core.context import context_for_test
from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub
from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails

_METADATA_BLOCK = (
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:start -->\n"
    "schema_version: 2\n"
    "created_by: test\n"
    "<!-- erk:metadata-block:end -->"
)

_SEPARATOR = "\n\n---\n\n"


def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    plan_header_block: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch="main",
        trunk_branch="main",
        use_graphite=False,
        force=False,
        debug=False,
        session_id="test-session",
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        issue_number=None,
        pr_number=None,
        pr_url=None,
        was_created=False,
        base_branch=None,
        graphite_url=None,
        diff_file=None,
        plan_context=None,
        title=None,
        body=None,
        plan_header_block=plan_header_block,
    )


def _pr_with_metadata(*, number: int = 42, branch: str = "feature") -> PRDetails:
    body = _METADATA_BLOCK + _SEPARATOR + "Plan content here"
    return PRDetails(
        number=number,
        url=f"https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/{number}",
        title="Test PR",
        body=body,
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name=branch,
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
        is_draft=True,
        is_cross_repository=False,
        owner="owner",
        repo="repo",
    )


def test_captures_metadata_from_existing_pr(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """Plan header block is captured from PR body containing a metadata block."""
    pr = _pr_with_metadata(number=42, branch="feature")
    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
    )
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert "<!-- erk:metadata-block:start -->" in result.plan_header_block
    assert result.plan_header_block.endswith(_SEPARATOR)


def test_no_pr_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When no PR exists for the branch, state is returned unchanged."""
    fake_github = FakeGitHub()
    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.plan_header_block == ""


def test_pr_without_metadata_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    """When PR body has no metadata block, state is returned unchanged."""
    pr = PRDetails(
        number=42,
        url="https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
        title="Test PR",
        body="Just a plain PR body with no metadata",
        state="OPEN",
        base_ref_name="main",
        head_ref_name="feature",
        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
        merge_state_status="CLEAN",

    result = capture_plan_header_block(ctx, state)

    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    assert result.plan_header_block == ""

format_plan_header_body_for_test(lifecycle_stage="planned") plan_issue = IssueInfo( number=321, title="Plan #321", body=plan_body, state="OPEN", url="https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/321", labels=["erk-plan"], assignees=[], created_at=datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, tzinfo=UTC), updated_at=datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, tzinfo=UTC), author="test-user", ) fake_issues = FakeGitHubIssues(issues={321: plan_issue}) pr = _pr_details(number=42) fake_git = FakeGit( repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path}, remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"}, ) fake_github = FakeGitHub( prs_by_branch={"feature": pr}, pr_details={42: pr}, issues_gateway=fake_issues, ) ctx = context_for_test( git=fake_git, github=fake_github, issues=fake_issues, plan_store=GitHubPlanStore(fake_issues), cwd=tmp_path, ) plan_ctx = PlanContext( plan_id="321", plan_content="# Plan\n\nImplement the thing.", objective_summary=None, ) state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, plan_context=plan_ctx) result = finalize_pr(ctx, state) assert isinstance(result, SubmitState) # Verify lifecycle_stage was updated in the plan issue assert len(fake_issues.updated_bodies) == 1 updated_body = fake_issues.updated_bodies[0][1] assert "lifecycle_stage: impl" in updated_body def test_no_lifecycle_update_with_only_issue_number(tmp_path: Path) -> None: """finalize_pr does NOT update lifecycle when only issue_number is set (no plan_context).""" plan_body = format_plan_header_body_for_test(lifecycle_stage="planned") plan_issue = IssueInfo( number=321, title="Plan #321", body=plan_body, state="OPEN", url="https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/321", labels=["erk-plan"], assignees=[], created_at=datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, tzinfo=UTC), updated_at=datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, tzinfo=UTC), author="test-user", ) fake_issues = FakeGitHubIssues(issues={321: plan_issue}) pr = _pr_details(number=42) fake_git = FakeGit( repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path}, remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"}, ) fake_github = FakeGitHub( prs_by_branch={"feature": pr}, pr_details={42: pr}, issues_gateway=fake_issues, ) ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, github=fake_github, issues=fake_issues, cwd=tmp_path) state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, issue_number=321, plan_context=None) result = finalize_pr(ctx, state) assert isinstance(result, SubmitState) # issue_number alone should NOT trigger lifecycle update assert len(fake_issues.updated_bodies) == 0 def test_updates_lifecycle_stage_for_draft_pr_backend(tmp_path: Path) -> None: """finalize_pr updates lifecycle for draft-PR backend where plan IS the PR.""" metadata_body = format_plan_header_body_for_test(lifecycle_stage="planned") plan_content = "# My Plan\n\nImplement the thing." pr_body = build_plan_stage_body(metadata_body, plan_content) pr = _pr_details(number=42, body=pr_body) fake_git = FakeGit( repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path}, remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"}, ) fake_github = FakeGitHub( prs_by_branch={"feature": pr}, pr_details={42: pr}, ) ctx = context_for_test( git=fake_git, github=fake_github, plan_store=PlannedPRBackend(fake_github, fake_github.issues, time=FakeTime()), cwd=tmp_path, ) state = _make_state( cwd=tmp_path, title="Implement feature", body="Summary of work", plan_context=None, issue_number=None, plan_header_block=extract_plan_header_block(pr_body), ) result = finalize_pr(ctx, state) assert isinstance(result, SubmitState) # First update is the PR body (title/body), second is lifecycle metadata update assert len(fake_github.updated_pr_bodies) >= 2 # The lifecycle update is the last PR body update lifecycle_body = fake_github.updated_pr_bodies[-1][1] assert "lifecycle_stage: impl" in lifecycle_body

1→"""Unit tests for fetch_plan_context pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     6→    SubmitState,
     7→    fetch_plan_context,
     8→)
     9→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    10→
    11→
    12→def _make_state(
    13→    *,
    14→    cwd: Path,
    15→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    16→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    17→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    18→    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    19→    use_graphite: bool = False,
    20→    force: bool = False,
    21→    debug: bool = False,
    22→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    23→    skip_description: bool = False,
    24→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    25→    pr_number: int | None = None,
    26→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    27→    was_created: bool = False,
    28→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    29→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    30→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    31→    plan_context: None = None,
    32→    title: str | None = None,
    33→    body: str | None = None,
    34→) -> SubmitState:
    35→    return SubmitState(
    36→        cwd=cwd,
    37→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    38→        branch_name=branch_name,
    39→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    40→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    41→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    42→        force=force,
    43→        debug=debug,
    44→        session_id=session_id,
    45→        skip_description=skip_description,
    46→        quiet=False,
    47→        issue_number=issue_number,
    48→        pr_number=pr_number,
    49→        pr_url=pr_url,
    50→        was_created=was_created,
    51→        base_branch=base_branch,
    52→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    53→        diff_file=diff_file,
    54→        plan_context=plan_context,
    55→        title=title,
    56→        body=body,
    57→        plan_header_block="",
    58→    )
    59→
    60→
    61→def test_skip_description_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    62→    """skip_description=True causes early return with state unchanged."""
    63→    ctx = context_for_test(cwd=tmp_path)
    64→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, skip_description=True)
    65→
    66→    result = fetch_plan_context(ctx, state)
    67→
    68→    assert result is state
    69→

1→"""Unit tests for extract_diff pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     6→    SubmitError,
     7→    SubmitState,
     8→    extract_diff,
     9→)
    10→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    11→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit
    12→
    13→
    14→def _make_state(
    15→    *,
    16→    cwd: Path,
    17→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    18→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    19→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    20→    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    21→    use_graphite: bool = False,
    22→    force: bool = False,
    23→    debug: bool = False,
    24→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    25→    skip_description: bool = False,
    26→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    27→    pr_number: int | None = None,
    28→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    29→    was_created: bool = False,
    30→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    31→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    32→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    33→    plan_context: None = None,
    34→    title: str | None = None,
    35→    body: str | None = None,
    36→) -> SubmitState:
    37→    return SubmitState(
    38→        cwd=cwd,
    39→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    40→        branch_name=branch_name,
    41→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    42→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    43→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    44→        force=force,
    45→        debug=debug,
    46→        session_id=session_id,
    47→        skip_description=skip_description,
    48→        quiet=False,
    49→        issue_number=issue_number,
    50→        pr_number=pr_number,
    51→        pr_url=pr_url,
    52→        was_created=was_created,
    53→        base_branch=base_branch,
    54→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    55→        diff_file=diff_file,
    56→        plan_context=plan_context,
    57→        title=title,
    58→        body=body,
    59→        plan_header_block="",
    60→    )
    61→
    62→
    63→def test_no_base_branch_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    64→    """SubmitError(error_type='no_base_branch') when base_branch is None."""
    65→    fake_git = FakeGit()
    66→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    67→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, base_branch=None)
    68→
    69→    result = extract_diff(ctx, state)
    70→
    71→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
    72→    assert result.error_type == "no_base_branch"
    73→
    74→
    75→def test_writes_scratch_file(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    76→    """diff_file path set and file exists after extraction."""
    77→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    78→        diff_to_branch={(tmp_path, "main"): "diff --git a/file.py\n+hello"},
    79→    )
    80→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    81→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, base_branch="main")
    82→
    83→    result = extract_diff(ctx, state)
    84→
    85→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    86→    assert result.diff_file is not None
    87→    assert result.diff_file.exists()
    88→    content = result.diff_file.read_text()
    89→    assert "hello" in content
    90→
    91→
    92→def test_skip_description_returns_state_unchanged(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    93→    """skip_description=True causes early return with state unchanged."""
    94→    fake_git = FakeGit()
    95→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    96→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, skip_description=True)
    97→
    98→    result = extract_diff(ctx, state)
    99→
   100→    assert result is state
   101→

1→"""Unit tests for _graphite_first_flow pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     6→    SubmitError,
     7→    SubmitState,
     8→    _graphite_first_flow,
     9→)
    10→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    11→from erk_shared.context.types import GlobalConfig
    12→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import BranchDivergence
    13→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit
    14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub
    15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails
    16→from erk_shared.gateway.graphite.fake import FakeGraphite
    17→
    18→
    19→def _make_state(
    20→    *,
    21→    cwd: Path,
    22→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    23→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    24→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    25→    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    26→    use_graphite: bool = True,
    27→    force: bool = False,
    28→    debug: bool = False,
    29→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    30→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    31→    pr_number: int | None = None,
    32→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    33→    was_created: bool = False,
    34→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    35→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    36→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    37→    plan_context: None = None,
    38→    title: str | None = None,
    39→    body: str | None = None,
    40→) -> SubmitState:
    41→    return SubmitState(
    42→        cwd=cwd,
    43→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    44→        branch_name=branch_name,
    45→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    46→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    47→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    48→        force=force,
    49→        debug=debug,
    50→        session_id=session_id,
    51→        skip_description=False,
    52→        quiet=False,
    53→        issue_number=issue_number,
    54→        pr_number=pr_number,
    55→        pr_url=pr_url,
    56→        was_created=was_created,
    57→        base_branch=base_branch,
    58→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    59→        diff_file=diff_file,
    60→        plan_context=plan_context,
    61→        title=title,
    62→        body=body,
    63→        plan_header_block="",
    64→    )
    65→
    66→
    67→def _pr_details(
    68→    *,
    69→    number: int = 42,
    70→    branch: str = "feature",
    71→) -> PRDetails:
    72→    return PRDetails(
    73→        number=number,
    74→        url=f"https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/{number}",
    75→        title="Test PR",
    76→        body="",
    77→        state="OPEN",
    78→        base_ref_name="main",
    79→        head_ref_name=branch,
    80→        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
    81→        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
    82→        is_draft=False,
    83→        is_cross_repository=False,
    84→        owner="owner",
    85→        repo="repo",
    86→    )
    87→
    88→
    89→def test_submit_failure_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    90→    """SubmitError(error_type='graphite_submit_failed') on RuntimeError."""
    91→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(
    92→        submit_stack_raises=RuntimeError("gt submit failed"),
    93→    )
    94→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
    95→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
    96→        use_graphite=True,
    97→        shell_setup_complete=False,
    98→        github_planning=True,
    99→    )
   100→    ctx = context_for_test(
   101→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   102→        cwd=tmp_path,
   103→        global_config=global_config,
   104→    )
   105→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   106→
   107→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   108→
   109→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   110→    assert result.error_type == "graphite_submit_failed"
   111→
   112→
   113→def test_restack_error_returns_actionable_message(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   114→    """SubmitError(error_type='graphite_restack_required') when restack needed."""
   115→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(
   116→        submit_stack_raises=RuntimeError(
   117→            "gt submit failed (exit code 1): "
   118→            "ERROR: You must restack and resolve conflicts with gt restack before submitting."
   119→        ),
   120→    )
   121→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   122→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   123→        use_graphite=True,
   124→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   125→        github_planning=True,
   126→    )
   127→    ctx = context_for_test(
   128→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   129→        cwd=tmp_path,
   130→        global_config=global_config,
   131→    )
   132→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   133→
   134→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   135→
   136→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   137→    assert result.error_type == "graphite_restack_required"
   138→    assert "gt restack" in result.message
   139→    assert "erk pr submit" in result.message
   140→
   141→
   142→def test_pr_not_found_after_submit_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   143→    """SubmitError(error_type='pr_not_found') when no PR after gt submit."""
   144→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
   145→    fake_github = FakeGitHub()  # No PRs configured
   146→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   147→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   148→        use_graphite=True,
   149→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   150→        github_planning=True,
   151→    )
   152→    ctx = context_for_test(
   153→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   154→        github=fake_github,
   155→        cwd=tmp_path,
   156→        global_config=global_config,
   157→    )
   158→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   159→
   160→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   161→
   162→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   163→    assert result.error_type == "pr_not_found"
   164→
   165→
   166→def test_success(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   167→    """PR number + graphite URL + was_created=True on success."""
   168→    pr = _pr_details(number=42, branch="feature")
   169→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
   170→    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
   171→        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
   172→    )
   173→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   174→        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
   175→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   176→    )
   177→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   178→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   179→        use_graphite=True,
   180→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   181→        github_planning=True,
   182→    )
   183→    ctx = context_for_test(
   184→        git=fake_git,
   185→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   186→        github=fake_github,
   187→        cwd=tmp_path,
   188→        global_config=global_config,
   189→    )
   190→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   191→
   192→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   193→
   194→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   195→    assert result.pr_number == 42
   196→    assert result.was_created is True
   197→    assert result.graphite_url is not None
   198→    assert "graphite" in result.graphite_url
   199→
   200→
   201→def test_plan_impl_auto_forces_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   202→    """Plan impl branch (issue_number set) auto-forces when behind remote; no error returned."""
   203→    pr = _pr_details(number=42, branch="feature")
   204→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
   205→    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
   206→        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
   207→    )
   208→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   209→        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
   210→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   211→        remote_branches={tmp_path: ["origin/feature"]},
   212→        branch_divergence={
   213→            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=3, behind=2)
   214→        },
   215→    )
   216→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   217→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   218→        use_graphite=True,
   219→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   220→        github_planning=True,
   221→    )
   222→    ctx = context_for_test(
   223→        git=fake_git,
   224→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   225→        github=fake_github,
   226→        cwd=tmp_path,
   227→        global_config=global_config,
   228→    )
   229→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, issue_number=7699)
   230→
   231→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   232→
   233→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   234→    assert result.pr_number == 42
   235→
   236→
   237→def test_branch_not_on_remote_skips_divergence_check(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   238→    """Branch absent from remote proceeds to gt submit without divergence check."""
   239→    pr = _pr_details(number=42, branch="feature")
   240→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite()
   241→    fake_github = FakeGitHub(
   242→        prs_by_branch={"feature": pr},
   243→    )
   244→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   245→        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
   246→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   247→        # remote_branches omitted: branch does not exist on remote
   248→    )
   249→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   250→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   251→        use_graphite=True,
   252→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   253→        github_planning=True,
   254→    )
   255→    ctx = context_for_test(
   256→        git=fake_git,
   257→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   258→        github=fake_github,
   259→        cwd=tmp_path,
   260→        global_config=global_config,
   261→    )
   262→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   263→
   264→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   265→
   266→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   267→    assert result.pr_number == 42
   268→
   269→
   270→def test_non_plan_branch_errors_on_divergence(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   271→    """Non-plan branch (no issue_number) still errors when behind remote."""
   272→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   273→        remote_branches={tmp_path: ["origin/feature"]},
   274→        branch_divergence={
   275→            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(is_diverged=True, ahead=1, behind=3)
   276→        },
   277→    )
   278→    global_config = GlobalConfig(
   279→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
   280→        use_graphite=True,
   281→        shell_setup_complete=False,
   282→        github_planning=True,
   283→    )
   284→    ctx = context_for_test(
   285→        git=fake_git,
   286→        cwd=tmp_path,
   287→        global_config=global_config,
   288→    )
   289→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, issue_number=None)
   290→
   291→    result = _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   292→

1→"""Unit tests for commit_wip pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (

     9→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    10→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit

    12→
    13→def _make_state(
    14→    *,
    15→    cwd: Path,
    16→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    17→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    18→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    19→    trunk_branch: str = "main",

    22→    debug: bool = False,
    23→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    24→    issue_number: int | None = None,

    26→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    27→    was_created: bool = False,
    28→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    29→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    30→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    31→    plan_context: None = None,
    32→    title: str | None = None,
    33→    body: str | None = None,
    34→) -> SubmitState:
    35→    return SubmitState(
    36→        cwd=cwd,

    38→        branch_name=branch_name,
    39→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    40→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,

    44→        session_id=session_id,

    60→
    61→def test_commits_when_uncommitted_changes(tmp_path: Path) -> None:

    63→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    64→        file_statuses={tmp_path: ([], ["modified.py"], [])},

    74→    assert fake_git.commit.commits[0].message == "WIP: Prepare for PR submission"

    85→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)

1→"""Unit tests for prepare_state pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→import json
     4→from pathlib import Path
     5→
     6→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     7→    SubmitError,
     8→    SubmitState,
     9→    prepare_state,
    10→)
    11→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    12→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit
    13→
    14→
    15→def _make_state(
    16→    *,
    17→    cwd: Path,
    18→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    19→    branch_name: str = "",
    20→    parent_branch: str = "",
    21→    trunk_branch: str = "",
    22→    use_graphite: bool = False,
    23→    force: bool = False,
    24→    debug: bool = False,
    25→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    26→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    27→    pr_number: int | None = None,
    28→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    29→    was_created: bool = False,
    30→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    31→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    32→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    33→    plan_context: None = None,
    34→    title: str | None = None,
    35→    body: str | None = None,
    36→) -> SubmitState:
    37→    return SubmitState(
    38→        cwd=cwd,
    39→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    40→        branch_name=branch_name,
    41→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    42→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    43→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    44→        force=force,
    45→        debug=debug,
    46→        session_id=session_id,
    47→        skip_description=False,
    48→        quiet=False,
    49→        issue_number=issue_number,
    50→        pr_number=pr_number,
    51→        pr_url=pr_url,
    52→        was_created=was_created,
    53→        base_branch=base_branch,
    54→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    55→        diff_file=diff_file,
    56→        plan_context=plan_context,
    57→        title=title,
    58→        body=body,
    59→        plan_header_block="",
    60→    )
    61→
    62→
    63→def test_resolves_branch_and_trunk(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    64→    """Happy path: all discovery fields populated."""
    65→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    66→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
    67→        current_branches={tmp_path: "feature-branch"},
    68→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
    69→    )
    70→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    71→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
    72→
    73→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
    74→
    75→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    76→    assert result.branch_name == "feature-branch"
    77→    assert result.trunk_branch == "main"
    78→    assert result.repo_root == tmp_path
    79→    # No Graphite parent => falls back to trunk
    80→    assert result.parent_branch == "main"
    81→
    82→
    83→def test_detached_head_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    84→    """current_branch=None => SubmitError(error_type='no_branch')."""
    85→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    86→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
    87→        current_branches={tmp_path: None},
    88→    )
    89→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    90→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
    91→
    92→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
    93→
    94→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
    95→    assert result.error_type == "no_branch"
    96→
    97→
    98→def test_issue_linkage_mismatch_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    99→    """Branch with P-prefix cannot extract issue number, no mismatch possible.
   100→
   101→    Since extract_leading_issue_number() always returns None, P-prefix branches
   102→    cannot provide an issue number. The test verifies issue_number comes from
   103→    issue.json without any mismatch error.
   104→    """
   105→    # Create .impl/issue.json with issue number
   106→    impl_dir = tmp_path / ".impl"
   107→    impl_dir.mkdir()
   108→    issue_json = impl_dir / "issue.json"
   109→    issue_json.write_text(
   110→        json.dumps(
   111→            {
   112→                "issue_number": 99,
   113→                "issue_url": "https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/99",
   114→                "created_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
   115→                "synced_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
   116→            }
   117→        )
   118→    )
   119→
   120→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   121→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   122→        current_branches={tmp_path: "P42-some-feature"},
   123→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
   124→    )
   125→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   126→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   127→
   128→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
   129→
   130→    # No mismatch error since branch cannot provide issue number
   131→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   132→    assert result.issue_number == 99  # From issue.json
   133→
   134→
   135→def test_auto_repair_creates_plan_ref_json(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   136→    """Branch with P-prefix cannot extract issue number, no auto-repair possible.
   137→
   138→    Since extract_leading_issue_number() always returns None, P-prefix branches
   139→    cannot provide an issue number for auto-repair. Without plan-ref.json,
   140→    issue_number remains None.
   141→    """
   142→    impl_dir = tmp_path / ".impl"
   143→    impl_dir.mkdir()
   144→
   145→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   146→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   147→        current_branches={tmp_path: "P42-some-feature"},
   148→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
   149→        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
   150→    )
   151→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   152→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   153→
   154→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
   155→
   156→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   157→    # No auto-repair since branch cannot provide issue number
   158→    assert result.issue_number is None
   159→    # Verify plan-ref.json was NOT created
   160→    plan_ref_json = impl_dir / "plan-ref.json"
   161→    assert not plan_ref_json.exists()
   162→
   163→
   164→def test_no_issue_number_from_branch(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   165→    """Regular branch (no P-prefix) => issue_number=None."""
   166→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   167→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   168→        current_branches={tmp_path: "feature-branch"},
   169→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
   170→    )
   171→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   172→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   173→
   174→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
   175→
   176→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   177→    assert result.issue_number is None
   178→
   179→
   180→def test_issue_from_impl_folder(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   181→    """.impl/issue.json present => issue_number populated."""
   182→    impl_dir = tmp_path / ".impl"
   183→    impl_dir.mkdir()
   184→    issue_json = impl_dir / "issue.json"
   185→    issue_json.write_text(
   186→        json.dumps(
   187→            {
   188→                "issue_number": 55,
   189→                "issue_url": "https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/55",
   190→                "created_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
   191→                "synced_at": "2025-01-01T00:00:00+00:00",
   192→            }
   193→        )
   194→    )
   195→
   196→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   197→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   198→        current_branches={tmp_path: "feature-branch"},
   199→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
   200→    )
   201→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   202→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   203→
   204→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
   205→
   206→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   207→    assert result.issue_number == 55
   208→
   209→
   210→def test_parent_falls_back_to_trunk(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   211→    """No Graphite parent => parent_branch == trunk_branch."""
   212→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   213→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   214→        current_branches={tmp_path: "feature-branch"},
   215→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "master"},
   216→    )
   217→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   218→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   219→
   220→    result = prepare_state(ctx, state)
   221→
   222→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   223→    assert result.parent_branch == "master"
   224→    assert result.trunk_branch == "master"
   225→

1→"""Unit tests for enhance_with_graphite pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     6→    SubmitError,

    10→from erk.core.context import context_for_test

    15→
    16→
    17→def _make_state(
    18→    *,
    19→    cwd: Path,
    20→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    21→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    22→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    23→    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    24→    use_graphite: bool = True,
    25→    force: bool = False,
    26→    debug: bool = False,
    27→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    28→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    29→    pr_number: int | None = 42,
    30→    pr_url: str | None = "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    31→    was_created: bool = False,
    32→    base_branch: str | None = "main",
    33→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    34→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    35→    plan_context: None = None,
    36→    title: str | None = None,
    37→    body: str | None = None,
    38→) -> SubmitState:
    39→    return SubmitState(
    40→        cwd=cwd,
    41→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    42→        branch_name=branch_name,
    43→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    44→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    45→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    46→        force=force,
    47→        debug=debug,
    48→        session_id=session_id,
    49→        skip_description=False,
    50→        quiet=False,
    51→        issue_number=issue_number,
    52→        pr_number=pr_number,
    53→        pr_url=pr_url,
    54→        was_created=was_created,
    55→        base_branch=base_branch,
    56→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    57→        diff_file=diff_file,
    58→        plan_context=plan_context,
    59→        title=title,
    60→        body=body,
    61→        plan_header_block="",
    62→    )
    63→
    64→
    65→def _graphite_config() -> GlobalConfig:
    66→    return GlobalConfig(
    67→        erk_root=Path("/test/erks"),
    68→        use_graphite=True,
    69→        shell_setup_complete=False,
    70→        github_planning=True,
    71→    )
    72→
    73→
    74→def test_noop_when_graphite_url_already_set(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    75→    """Returns state unchanged when graphite_url is already populated."""
    76→    ctx = context_for_test(cwd=tmp_path)
    77→    state = _make_state(
    78→        cwd=tmp_path,
    79→        graphite_url="https://app.graphite.com/github/pr/owner/repo/42",
    80→    )
    81→
    82→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
    83→
    84→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    85→    assert result is state  # Exact same object returned
    86→
    87→
    88→def test_noop_when_use_graphite_false(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    89→    """Returns state unchanged when use_graphite=False."""
    90→    ctx = context_for_test(cwd=tmp_path)
    91→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, use_graphite=False)
    92→
    93→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
    94→
    95→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
    96→    assert result is state
    97→
    98→
    99→def test_skips_when_not_authenticated(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   100→    """No submit called when Graphite is not authenticated."""
   101→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(authenticated=False)
   102→    ctx = context_for_test(
   103→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   104→        cwd=tmp_path,
   105→        global_config=_graphite_config(),
   106→    )
   107→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)

   109→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
   110→
   111→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)

   114→
   115→
   116→def test_skips_when_branch_not_tracked(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   117→    """No submit called when branch is not in Graphite's tracked branches."""
   118→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(branches={})  # No branches tracked
   119→    fake_git = FakeGit(repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path})
   120→    ctx = context_for_test(
   121→        git=fake_git,
   122→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   123→        cwd=tmp_path,
   124→        global_config=_graphite_config(),
   125→    )
   126→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   127→
   128→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
   129→
   130→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   131→    assert result.graphite_url is None

   133→
   134→
   135→def test_returns_submit_error_for_non_benign_runtime_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   136→    """Non-benign RuntimeError from submit_stack => SubmitError."""
   137→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(
   138→        branches={
   139→            "feature": BranchMetadata(
   140→                name="feature",
   141→                parent="main",
   142→                children=[],
   143→                is_trunk=False,
   144→                commit_sha="abc123",
   145→            )
   146→        },
   147→        submit_stack_raises=RuntimeError("network timeout"),
   148→    )
   149→    fake_git = FakeGit(repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path})
   150→    ctx = context_for_test(
   151→        git=fake_git,
   152→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   153→        cwd=tmp_path,
   154→        global_config=_graphite_config(),
   155→    )
   156→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   157→
   158→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
   159→
   160→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   161→    assert result.error_type == "graphite_enhance_failed"
   162→    assert "network timeout" in result.message
   163→
   164→
   165→def test_success_sets_graphite_url(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   166→    """graphite_url populated on successful submit."""
   167→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(
   168→        branches={
   169→            "feature": BranchMetadata(
   170→                name="feature",
   171→                parent="main",
   172→                children=[],
   173→                is_trunk=False,
   174→                commit_sha="abc123",
   175→            )
   176→        },
   177→    )
   178→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   179→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
   180→        remote_urls={(tmp_path, "origin"): "git@github.com:owner/repo.git"},
   181→    )
   182→    ctx = context_for_test(
   183→        git=fake_git,
   184→        graphite=fake_graphite,
   185→        cwd=tmp_path,

   188→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   189→
   190→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)
   191→
   192→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   193→    assert result.graphite_url is not None
   194→    assert "graphite" in result.graphite_url
   195→    assert len(fake_graphite.submit_stack_calls) == 1
   196→
   197→
   198→def test_benign_nothing_to_submit_returns_state(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   199→    """'Nothing to submit' RuntimeError is benign — returns SubmitState, not SubmitError."""
   200→    fake_graphite = FakeGraphite(
   201→        branches={
   202→            "feature": BranchMetadata(
   203→                name="feature",
   204→                parent="main",

   212→    fake_git = FakeGit(repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path})
   213→    ctx = context_for_test(

   221→    result = enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state)

1→"""Unit tests for run_submit_pipeline and make_initial_state."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→from unittest.mock import patch
     5→
     6→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     7→    SubmitError,
     8→    SubmitState,
     9→    make_initial_state,
    10→    run_submit_pipeline,
    11→)
    12→from erk.core.context import ErkContext, context_for_test
    13→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit
    14→
    15→
    16→def test_stops_at_first_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    17→    """Early error prevents later steps from running."""
    18→    # prepare_state will fail because detached HEAD
    19→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    20→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
    21→        current_branches={tmp_path: None},
    22→    )
    23→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    24→    state = make_initial_state(
    25→        cwd=tmp_path,
    26→        use_graphite=False,
    27→        force=False,
    28→        debug=False,
    29→        session_id="test",
    30→        skip_description=False,
    31→        quiet=False,
    32→    )
    33→
    34→    result = run_submit_pipeline(ctx, state)
    35→
    36→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
    37→    assert result.error_type == "no_branch"
    38→    assert result.phase == "prepare"
    39→
    40→
    41→def test_threads_state_through_steps(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    42→    """State is threaded: prepare_state populates fields, commit_wip sees them."""
    43→    fake_git = FakeGit(
    44→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},
    45→        current_branches={tmp_path: "feature"},
    46→        trunk_branches={tmp_path: "main"},
    47→        # commit_wip checks has_uncommitted_changes => False (clean)
    48→        # push_and_create_pr will fail at auth check (no auth configured),
    49→        # but that proves state was threaded through prepare_state and commit_wip
    50→    )
    51→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
    52→    state = make_initial_state(
    53→        cwd=tmp_path,
    54→        use_graphite=False,
    55→        force=False,
    56→        debug=False,
    57→        session_id="test",
    58→        skip_description=False,
    59→        quiet=False,
    60→    )
    61→
    62→    result = run_submit_pipeline(ctx, state)
    63→
    64→    # Pipeline should get past prepare_state (populated branch_name)
    65→    # and commit_wip (no-op, clean), then fail at push_and_create_pr
    66→    # which checks GitHub auth.
    67→    # FakeGitHub defaults to authenticated=True, so it should fail at
    68→    # no_commits (0 commits ahead) since we didn't configure commits_ahead.
    69→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
    70→    assert result.error_type == "no_commits"
    71→    assert result.phase == "push_and_create_pr"
    72→
    73→
    74→def test_make_initial_state_sets_placeholders(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    75→    """Factory defaults are correct."""
    76→    state = make_initial_state(
    77→        cwd=tmp_path,
    78→        use_graphite=True,
    79→        force=True,
    80→        debug=True,
    81→        session_id="my-session",
    82→        skip_description=False,
    83→        quiet=False,
    84→    )
    85→
    86→    assert state.cwd == tmp_path
    87→    assert state.repo_root == tmp_path
    88→    assert state.branch_name == ""
    89→    assert state.parent_branch == ""
    90→    assert state.trunk_branch == ""
    91→    assert state.use_graphite is True
    92→    assert state.force is True
    93→    assert state.debug is True
    94→    assert state.session_id == "my-session"
    95→    assert state.issue_number is None
    96→    assert state.pr_number is None
    97→    assert state.pr_url is None
    98→    assert state.was_created is False
    99→    assert state.base_branch is None
   100→    assert state.graphite_url is None
   101→    assert state.diff_file is None
   102→    assert state.plan_context is None
   103→    assert state.title is None
   104→    assert state.body is None
   105→    assert state.plan_header_block == ""
   106→
   107→
   108→def test_catches_unhandled_exception_from_step(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   109→    """Unhandled exception in a step becomes SubmitError, not a propagated exception."""
   110→
   111→    def _exploding_step(_ctx: ErkContext, _state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   112→        msg = "database connection lost"
   113→        raise ConnectionError(msg)
   114→
   115→    ctx = context_for_test(cwd=tmp_path)
   116→    state = make_initial_state(
   117→        cwd=tmp_path,
   118→        use_graphite=False,
   119→        force=False,
   120→        debug=False,
   121→        session_id="test",
   122→        skip_description=False,
   123→        quiet=False,
   124→    )
   125→
   126→    with patch(
   127→        "erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline._submit_pipeline",
   128→        return_value=(_exploding_step,),
   129→    ):
   130→        result = run_submit_pipeline(ctx, state)
   131→
   132→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   133→    assert result.error_type == "unhandled_exception"
   134→    assert result.phase == "_exploding_step"
   135→    assert "database connection lost" in result.message
   136→

1→"""Unit tests for _core_submit_flow pipeline step."""
     2→
     3→from pathlib import Path
     4→
     5→from erk.cli.commands.pr.submit_pipeline import (
     6→    SubmitError,
     7→    SubmitState,
     8→    _core_submit_flow,
     9→)
    10→from erk.core.context import context_for_test
    11→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import BranchDivergence
    12→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit
    13→from erk_shared.gateway.git.remote_ops.types import PushError
    14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeGitHub
    15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails
    16→
    17→
    18→def _make_state(
    19→    *,
    20→    cwd: Path,
    21→    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    22→    branch_name: str = "feature",
    23→    parent_branch: str = "main",
    24→    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    25→    use_graphite: bool = False,
    26→    force: bool = False,
    27→    debug: bool = False,
    28→    session_id: str = "test-session",
    29→    issue_number: int | None = None,
    30→    pr_number: int | None = None,
    31→    pr_url: str | None = None,
    32→    was_created: bool = False,
    33→    base_branch: str | None = None,
    34→    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    35→    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    36→    plan_context: None = None,
    37→    title: str | None = None,
    38→    body: str | None = None,
    39→    plan_header_block: str = "",
    40→) -> SubmitState:
    41→    return SubmitState(
    42→        cwd=cwd,
    43→        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
    44→        branch_name=branch_name,
    45→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
    46→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
    47→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
    48→        force=force,
    49→        debug=debug,
    50→        session_id=session_id,
    51→        skip_description=False,
    52→        quiet=False,
    53→        issue_number=issue_number,
    54→        pr_number=pr_number,
    55→        pr_url=pr_url,
    56→        was_created=was_created,
    57→        base_branch=base_branch,
    58→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    59→        diff_file=diff_file,
    60→        plan_context=plan_context,
    61→        title=title,
    62→        body=body,
    63→        plan_header_block=plan_header_block,
    64→    )
    65→
    66→
    67→def _pr_details(
    68→    *,
    69→    number: int = 42,
    70→    branch: str = "feature",
    71→    base: str = "main",
    72→    body: str = "",
    73→) -> PRDetails:
    74→    return PRDetails(
    75→        number=number,
    76→        url=f"https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/{number}",
    77→        title="Test PR",
    78→        body=body,
    79→        state="OPEN",
    80→        base_ref_name=base,
    81→        head_ref_name=branch,
    82→        mergeable="MERGEABLE",
    83→        merge_state_status="CLEAN",
    84→        is_draft=False,
    85→        is_cross_repository=False,
    86→        owner="owner",
    87→        repo="repo",
    88→    )
    89→
    90→
    91→def test_github_auth_failure_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
    92→    """SubmitError(error_type='github_auth_failed') when not authenticated."""
    93→    fake_github = FakeGitHub(authenticated=False)
    94→    ctx = context_for_test(github=fake_github, cwd=tmp_path)
    95→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
    96→
    97→    result = _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)
    98→
    99→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   100→    assert result.error_type == "github_auth_failed"
   101→
   102→
   103→def test_no_commits_ahead_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   104→    """SubmitError(error_type='no_commits') when zero commits ahead of parent."""
   105→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   106→        commits_ahead={(tmp_path, "main"): 0},
   107→        branch_divergence={
   108→            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(
   109→                is_diverged=False,
   110→                ahead=0,
   111→                behind=0,
   112→            )
   113→        },
   114→    )
   115→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   116→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path)
   117→
   118→    result = _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)
   119→
   120→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   121→    assert result.error_type == "no_commits"
   122→
   123→
   124→def test_branch_diverged_returns_error(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   125→    """Diverged + not force => error."""
   126→    fake_git = FakeGit(
   127→        commits_ahead={(tmp_path, "main"): 3},
   128→        branch_divergence={
   129→            (tmp_path, "feature", "origin"): BranchDivergence(
   130→                is_diverged=True,
   131→                ahead=3,
   132→                behind=2,
   133→            )
   134→        },
   135→    )
   136→    ctx = context_for_test(git=fake_git, cwd=tmp_path)
   137→    state = _make_state(cwd=tmp_path, force=False)
   138→
   139→    result = _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)
   140→
   141→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitError)
   142→    assert result.error_type == "branch_diverged"
   143→
   144→
   145→def test_force_allows_diverged_push(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
   146→    """force=True bypasses divergence check and creates PR."""

   153→                ahead=3,
   154→                behind=2,
   155→            )

   157→        repository_roots={tmp_path: tmp_path},

   165→
   166→    result = _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)
   167→
   168→    assert isinstance(result, SubmitState)
   169→    assert result.pr_number == 42
